title: lyonia truncata var. truncata
intro: Lyonia truncata var. truncata, also known as the Frankia shrub or Rabbiteye Mountain Holly, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other compounds. The health benefits of Lyonia truncata var. truncata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
